intro.title: How the NASUN Leaderboard Works
intro.description: Earn points by engaging with NASUN on X (Twitter). Follow, like, repost, and reply to earn your rank. Follow us at

rewards.topPercentageShare: Top percentage share of the airdrop reward pool
rewards.percentageShare: Percentage share of the airdrop reward pool
rewards.freeMint: Free mint for Genesis NFT collection
rewards.discountedMint: Discounted mint for Genesis NFT collection
rewards.allowlistAccess: Guaranteed allowlist access for future drops
rewards.beyondRewards: All participants are eligible for random prize drawings and community rewards

scoringOverview.title: Scoring Overview
scoringOverview.description: Points are calculated based on your engagement with official NASUN posts on X (Twitter). Each interaction type carries a different weight. Likes, reposts, replies, and quote tweets all contribute to your score.
scoringOverview.policyNote: Scoring weights and policies may be adjusted at any time to maintain fairness and prevent abuse.

finalNotes.title: Important Notes
items: Scores are updated periodically, not in real-time
Only interactions with official NASUN posts are counted
Multiple accounts from the same user will be merged or disqualified
The team reserves the right to adjust scores for fairness

rulesGuidelines.title: Rules & Guidelines
rulesGuidelines.description: To maintain a fair and genuine community, the following activities are prohibited:

items: Using bots, scripts, or automated tools to generate likes, reposts, or replies
Posting repetitive, irrelevant, or low-quality replies solely to farm points
Creating multiple accounts to artificially inflate engagement or rankings
Coordinating with others to artificially boost each other's scores
Purchasing engagement (likes, followers, reposts) from third-party services
prohibited.disclaimer: Violations may result in score reduction, disqualification, or permanent ban from the leaderboard program.

dataPrivacy.title: Data & Privacy
dataPrivacy.description: We collect only publicly available data from the X (Twitter) API to calculate leaderboard scores.
items: Public tweet interactions (likes, reposts, replies) with NASUN posts
Follower status relative to NASUN accounts
dataPrivacy.scoringNote: We do not access private messages, protected tweets, or any non-public data. Your X account credentials are never stored.
